info.name: HubSpot CMS HubDB API
info.description:
The HubDB API allows you to create, update, and delete HubDB data tables and their rows. HubDB tables can be used as data sources for dynamic CMS pages and are available in both draft and published versions. Each table has a live version and a draft version that can be edited and published independently.

Contact Support:
 Name: HubSpot Developer Support

item.name: Hubspot Get a Hubdb Table Row

variable.description: (Required) The ID or name of the HubDB table.
(Required) The ID of the row to retrieve.

request.description: Returns a specific row from a HubDB table by its row ID. Returns the published version of the row by default.

response.name: Successful response with the row details.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

response.name: Authentication credentials are missing or invalid.

response.name: The requested resource was not found.

item.name: Hubspot Update a Hubdb Table Row

variable.description: (Required) The ID or name of the HubDB table.
(Required) The ID of the row to update.

request.description: Performs a partial update of a specific HubDB table row. Only the columns included in the request body will be updated. Changes are applied to the draft version and must be published.

response.name: Row updated successfully.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

response.name: The request is invalid or missing required parameters.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

response.name: Authentication credentials are missing or invalid.

response.name: The requested resource was not found.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Hubspot Delete a Hubdb Table Row

variable.description: (Required) The ID or name of the HubDB table.
(Required) The ID of the row to delete.

request.description: Permanently deletes a row from a HubDB table. The deletion is applied to the draft version and must be published to remove the row from live pages.

response.name: Row deleted successfully.

response.name: Authentication credentials are missing or invalid.

request.description: Returns the rows of a specific HubDB table. By default, returns rows from the published version of the table. Use the draft parameter to retrieve rows from the draft version.

item.name: Hubspot Add a Row to a Hubdb Table

variable.description: (Required) The ID or name of the HubDB table to add a row to.

request.description: Adds a new row to a HubDB table. The row data is added to the draft version of the table. Publish the table draft to make the new row visible on live pages.

response.name: Row added successfully.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

response.name: The request is invalid or missing required parameters.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

response.name: Authentication credentials are missing or invalid.

response.name: The requested resource was not found.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

variable.description: (Required) The ID or name of the HubDB table to publish.

request.description: Publishes the draft version of a HubDB table, making all pending changes to the table structure and rows live. After publishing, the draft and live versions are synchronized.

response.name: Table draft published successfully.

request.description: Permanently deletes a HubDB table and all its rows. This action cannot be undone. Deleting a table that is used by CMS pages may break those pages.
